privacy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At {brandName}, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our creative fashion platform.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.content: We collect and process the following types of personal data:

items.0: Account information: email address, name, password (encrypted)
items.1: Order information: shipping address, billing address, purchase history
items.2: Payment information: processed securely through Stripe (we do not store card details)
items.3: Design data: AI-generated designs you create, personalization preferences
items.4: Usage data: chat conversations with our AI agent, page views, interaction patterns
items.5: Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information, cookies
items.6: Marketing preferences: newsletter subscription status, communication preferences

legalBasis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.content: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:

items.0: Contract performance: to fulfill your orders and provide our services
items.1: Legitimate interests: to improve our platform, prevent fraud, and analyze usage
items.2: Consent: for marketing communications and optional analytics cookies
items.3: Legal obligation: to comply with tax, accounting, and legal requirements

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal data only as long as necessary:

items.0: Account data: until you delete your account, then 30 days grace period
items.1: Order history: 7 years for tax and legal compliance
items.2: Chat conversations: 1 year, then automatically deleted
items.3: Audit logs: 2 years for security and compliance
items.4: Marketing events: 6 months for campaign analysis
items.5: Unconfirmed accounts: 30 days, then automatically deleted

thirdParties.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParties.content: We share your data with trusted third-party service providers:

items.3: Google Gemini: AI embeddings for product recommendations
items.4: fal.ai: AI image generation for custom designs

rights.title: Your Privacy Rights
rights.content: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.0: Right to access: request a copy of your personal data
items.1: Right to rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data
items.2: Right to erasure: delete your account and personal data
items.3: Right to data portability: download your data in machine-readable format
items.4: Right to withdraw consent: unsubscribe from marketing at any time
items.5: Right to object: opt-out of profiling and automated decision-making
items.6: Right to lodge a complaint: contact your local data protection authority

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related questions, data subject access requests, or to exercise your rights, please contact us at: privacy@example.com. We will respond within 30 days.

privacy.footer: This privacy policy may be updated periodically. Continued use of our platform constitutes acceptance of any changes.

terms.title: Terms of Service

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to {brandName}. By accessing or using our creative fashion platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before using our services.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By creating an account, placing an order, or using any feature of our platform, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you must discontinue use immediately.

items.0: You must be at least 18 years old to use our services
items.1: You represent that all information you provide is accurate and complete
items.2: You agree to comply with all applicable laws and regulations
items.3: You accept sole responsibility for your account activity

services.title: Our Services
services.content: {brandName} provides a creative platform for creating custom designs and ordering personalized products. Our services include:

items.0: Custom design creation using advanced creative tools
items.1: Custom product creation and personalization tools
items.2: Print-on-demand fulfillment through our partner network (Printify)
items.5: Design storage and management in your account

userAccounts.title: User Accounts
userAccounts.content: To access certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for:

items.0: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
items.1: All activities that occur under your account
items.2: Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized access
items.3: Providing accurate and up-to-date contact information
items.4: Not sharing your account with others or creating multiple accounts

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property Rights
intellectualProperty.content: Ownership and licensing of content created and used on our platform:

items.0: You retain ownership of designs you create using our AI tools
items.1: You grant us a license to use your designs for order fulfillment
items.2: You must have rights to any text, images, or content you upload
items.3: You may not use designs that infringe third-party intellectual property
items.4: Our platform, code, and AI models remain our exclusive property
items.5: You may not reverse-engineer, copy, or redistribute our technology

ordersAndPayments.title: Orders and Payments
ordersAndPayments.content: All orders are subject to acceptance and availability. Payment terms:

items.0: Prices are displayed in your selected currency and include applicable taxes
items.1: Payment is processed securely through Stripe at checkout
items.2: We reserve the right to reject or cancel orders for any reason
items.3: Once production begins, orders cannot be modified or cancelled
items.4: Refunds and returns are subject to our Returns & Refunds policy
items.5: You are responsible for providing accurate shipping information

prohibitedUses.title: Prohibited Uses
prohibitedUses.content: You may not use our platform for any unlawful or prohibited purpose, including:

items.0: Creating designs with offensive, defamatory, or hateful content
items.1: Violating intellectual property rights of others
items.2: Attempting to circumvent security or access controls
items.3: Using our services for fraudulent or deceptive purposes
items.4: Scraping, mining, or harvesting data from our platform
items.5: Interfering with or disrupting our services or servers
items.6: Reselling or redistributing our AI-generated designs without rights

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, {brandName} shall not be liable for:

items.0: Indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages
items.1: Loss of profits, revenue, data, or business opportunities
items.2: Delays or failures in delivery caused by third-party fulfillment partners
items.3: Errors or inaccuracies in AI-generated content or designs
items.4: Unauthorized access to your account due to your negligence
items.5: Product defects or quality issues arising from manufacturing

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time:

items.0: For violation of these Terms of Service or our policies
items.1: For fraudulent, abusive, or unlawful activity
items.3: Upon your request to delete your account
items.4: If your account remains inactive for an extended period

governingLaw.title: Governing Law and Disputes
governingLaw.content: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction where our company is registered. Any disputes shall be resolved through:

items.0: Good faith negotiation between you and {brandName}
items.1: Binding arbitration if negotiation fails (where permitted by law)
items.2: The exclusive jurisdiction of courts in our registered location
items.3: You waive the right to participate in class action lawsuits

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at: legal@example.com. We will respond to all inquiries within 5 business days.

terms.footer: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Continued use of our platform constitutes acceptance of any changes.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.description: Learn about how we use cookies and manage your preferences

managePreferences.title: Manage Your Cookie Preferences
managePreferences.description: Click the button to customize which cookies we can use

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.description: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit our website. They help us improve your browsing experience, remember your preferences, and provide personalized content. Cookies do not contain any personally identifiable information unless you have explicitly provided it.

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly. They enable core functionality such as security, network management, and accessibility. You cannot opt-out of necessary cookies.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our website's performance and user experience.
analytics.noCookies: We currently do not use any third-party analytics cookies. Our analytics are processed server-side using first-party data only.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites and display personalized ads that are relevant to you. They also help measure the effectiveness of our advertising campaigns.
marketing.noCookies: We currently do not use any marketing or advertising cookies.

session_id.purpose: Maintains your session and authentication state

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.description: We use cookies from trusted third-party services to enhance your experience:

howToManage.title: How to Manage Cookies
howToManage.description: You have several options to control or limit how we and our partners use cookies:

methods.settings: Use the 'Cookie Settings' button at the top of this page to change your preferences
methods.browser: Configure your browser settings to block or delete cookies (this may affect website functionality)
methods.optOut: Opt-out of targeted advertising through industry opt-out tools like the Digital Advertising Alliance

cookiePolicy.footer: This cookie policy was last updated on February 22, 2026. We may update this policy from time to time. Please review it periodically for changes.

legalNotice.description: Company information and legal details as required by law

about.title: About {storeName}
about.subtitle: Empowering self-expression through unique fashion
about.missionText: We believe everyone deserves access to professional-quality custom products. Our platform democratizes design, making it possible for anyone to create stunning, personalized merchandise without needing design skills or large budgets.
about.featureAiSubtitle: Create stunning designs with our advanced AI design tools
about.featureAiText: Our cutting-edge AI understands your vision and transforms it into professional designs. From text descriptions to style references, our tools adapt to your creative process.
about.featureProductsSubtitle: From apparel to home decor, customize anything
about.featureProductsText: Choose from hundreds of high-quality products spanning apparel, accessories, home decor, and more. Each item is made to order with premium materials and printing techniques.
about.featureFulfillmentText: Our global network of print partners ensures fast production times and reliable shipping to over 100 countries. Track your order every step of the way.
about.featureCommunitySubtitle: Join thousands of creators and entrepreneurs
about.featureCommunityText: Be part of a growing community of creators, artists, and entrepreneurs who are building their brands with {storeName}. Share designs, get inspired, and grow together.
about.storyP1: {storeName} was born from a simple idea: what if anyone could create professional-quality custom products that truly express who they are? Founded in 2024, we set out to build a brand that combines cutting-edge creative tools with premium European manufacturing.
about.storyP2: Today, we serve thousands of customers worldwide, helping them bring their creative visions to life. From individual artists to growing businesses, our platform empowers everyone to create, customize, and sell unique products.
about.whyNoCost: No inventory or upfront costs - products are made on-demand
about.whyAi: Design tools that work with you, not against you
about.whySustainable: Sustainable production that reduces waste and environmental impact
about.whySecure: Secure payments and reliable fulfillment through trusted partners
about.whySupport: 24/7 support from our AI assistant and human team

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our platform, products, and services.
faq.stillQuestionsDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.
faq.a1: {storeName} is a print-on-demand platform where every piece has a story — yours. Describe your design idea, and we'll create professional-quality designs that can be printed on a wide range of products, all made in Europe.
faq.q2: How does AI design generation work?
faq.a2: Our AI understands natural language descriptions and visual references. Simply type what you want (e.g., 'a minimalist mountain landscape in blue tones') and the AI will generate multiple design options. You can then refine, customize, and apply them to products.
faq.a3: Not at all! Our AI handles the design work for you. Just describe your idea in words, choose a style, and the AI creates professional designs. You can also upload reference images for inspiration.
faq.a4: Standard shipping typically takes 5-12 business days depending on your location. Express shipping options are available at checkout for faster delivery. All orders include tracking information.
faq.a5: Yes! Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also track all your orders in real-time through your account dashboard.
faq.a6: Yes, we ship to over 100 countries worldwide. Shipping costs and delivery times vary by destination. You can see exact shipping costs at checkout.
faq.q7: What happens if my order is damaged?
faq.a7: If your order arrives damaged, contact us within 30 days with photos of the damage. We'll send a replacement at no additional cost or provide a full refund.
faq.a8: We offer a wide range of customizable products including t-shirts, hoodies, phone cases, mugs, posters, tote bags, and more. New products are added regularly.
faq.q9: Can I use my own designs?
faq.a9: You can use our AI to generate designs based on your descriptions, or combine AI generation with your own creative direction. The AI can also enhance and adapt existing concepts.
faq.q10: What print quality can I expect?
faq.a10: We use professional-grade printing technology including DTG (Direct-to-Garment) for apparel and high-resolution printing for accessories and home decor. All prints are durable and wash-resistant.
faq.a11: No hidden fees! Product prices include printing and production costs. You only pay for the product price plus shipping. Premium subscribers get additional discounts on bulk orders.
faq.a12: We offer a free tier with basic features and a Premium subscription for power users. Product prices vary by item type. See our pricing page for detailed information.
faq.q13: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a13: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), as well as cryptocurrency payments through our secure payment processor.
faq.a14: No subscription is required to browse and purchase products. The free tier gives you access to basic AI features. Premium subscription unlocks unlimited designs and additional perks.
faq.a15: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for items that are defective or significantly different from the preview. Since products are custom-made, we cannot accept returns for change of mind.
faq.q16: How do I request a refund?
faq.a16: To request a refund, go to your order history, select the order, and click 'Request Return'. Describe the issue and upload photos if applicable. Our team will review and process your request within 48 hours.
faq.a17: Due to the custom nature of our products, direct exchanges aren't available. However, if there's an issue with your order, we can provide a refund or reprint with the correct specifications.
faq.a18: Once approved, refunds are processed within 5-10 business days. The refund will appear on your original payment method. You'll receive an email confirmation when the refund is initiated.
